data.raceName: WATCH LIVE RACING AT BETWAY HANDICAP
data.raceComments: {"comment":"6. ROYAL VELVET returns after six and a half months. Remains a horse of interest on previous figures now advancing in distance. Appeals as a major player with William Buick engaged. 13. GANGSTA MAN nearly made a winning comeback when touched off by a nose over 1000m at Musselburgh. Another bold showing looks likely. 11. GOLDMOYNE followed a recent victory with a close third at Musselburgh tackling 1400m. With Cieren Fallon back on board he merits serious respect. 5. MORTE POINT has not been seen since scoring at Southwell in October yet that success reads well and he holds definite top three claims.","runners":[6,13,11,5],"exclusive":false}
